description:
🕒 09:30–14:40

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/tanetsuti-1-2/

SCHEDULE CHANGE: The tour originally scheduled for June 21 (Sunday) has been rescheduled to June 28 (Sunday) due to organizer circumstances.

Learn to build "kinoko-chan" (mushroom compost) beds using fallen leaves and branches, then plant summer vegetables. Our advisors will clearly explain kinoko-chan farming methods—planting techniques and growing tips. Lunch will be served at restaurant "La Nola," featuring Italian cuisine made with kinoko-chan vegetables.

【Fee】Adults ¥8,800 | Middle school students and younger ¥2,200 (includes guide, lunch, materials, and insurance)

【Capacity】15 people

【Guide】Hanno Tane-to-Tsuchi Farm staff

【What to bring】Drinking water, hat, towel, gloves, etc.
location: 集合 ラ・ノーラ前の畑 （飯能市下加治243-25、イーグルバス「飯能靖和病院」下車徒歩8分）
summary: Experience kinoko-chan (mushroom compost) farm-building and summer vegetable planting in Hanno's forest setting
